business.name: The A/C Doctor
business.tagline: Diagnosing and curing your cooling problems

hero.headline: *Georgia heat* got your unit down? We make house calls.
hero.subheadline: When your A/C quits in the middle of July, you need someone who shows up and knows what they're doing. That's us.

services_section.label: THE TREATMENT
services_section.heading: Every A/C Problem Has a Solution
services_section.subheading: From quick fixes to full replacements — we handle whatever's keeping you hot

services.title: A/C Repair & Diagnosis
services.description: Your unit's acting up? We'll find what's wrong and fix it right the first time. No guessing, no comebacks.

services.title: Complete System Replacement
services.description: When repair isn't enough, we'll install a new unit that'll keep you cool for years. Fair pricing, quality work.

services.title: Heating System Service
services.description: Heat pump problems? Furnace issues? We service all heating systems to keep you comfortable year-round.

services.title: Maintenance & Tune-ups
services.description: Regular checkups prevent breakdowns. We'll keep your system running smooth so you don't sweat the small stuff.

about.heading: Frank and The A/C Doctor Team
about.body: We've been keeping Macon homes comfortable through Georgia's toughest weather. When you call, you get straight answers and honest work. No surprises, no runaround — just reliable HVAC service that gets the job done right.

reviews.name: Jessica B.
reviews.text: Frank is professional and knowledgeable. He answered all my questions and always responded to calls. Highly recommend this company.

reviews.name: Shira L.
reviews.text: Super knowledgeable, efficient, and affordable. Never felt like he was trying to take advantage. Unit works like a charm and he followed up.

reviews.name: Felicia H.
reviews.text: Frank is very professional. Fixed my A/C two years ago. When you call, he responds and he's on time. Good service.

cta.heading: Your A/C Needs Attention?
cta.body: Don't sweat it out another day. Call The A/C Doctor and get your cooling system back to perfect health.
